summary: RELEASE GATE TESTING COMPLETE - Multi-Model Engine, Rules Transparency, and Auto-Tuner validated. 41/41 backend tests pass. All critical UI components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-Model Engine properly isolates Model A/B/C with independent $10,000 capital, positions, PnL ledger
Risk Guardrails properly configured: max_dollars_per_trade, max_exposure, max_daily_loss, max_trades_per_hour
Kill Switch works correctly - activates/deactivates and UI reflects state
PnL Math verified: Realized + Unrealized = Total
Rule Chips display 7-9 key thresholds per model (Edge min, Score min, Persist, Cooldown, Max spread)
Rules Drawer shows human-readable summary auto-generated from JSON config
Config versioning with history and rollback endpoints available
Auto-Tuner running in auto_apply_paper mode with scheduler active
Decision logging provides per-trade explainability with decision reasons
test_credentials: No credentials needed - paper trading mode
seed_data_creation: Test orders created with TEST-MKT-* market IDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Release Gate tests completed for Multi-Model Engine (A-F), Rules Transparency (G-I), and Auto-Tuner (J-M). All APIs verified: /api/strategies/summary, /api/strategies/{id}, /api/rules/{id}, /api/rules/{id}/history, /api/tuner/status, /api/tuner/run, /api/tuner/proposals. Kill switch drill passed. UI shows Strategy Command Center with 3 model cards, rule chips, View Rules drawer, and admin controls.

multi_model_engine.A_strategy_isolation: PASS - 3 models with independent $10,000 capital, positions, PnL
multi_model_engine.C_order_lifecycle: PASS - 7-state lifecycle (SUBMITTED, ACK, PARTIAL, FILLED, REJECTED, CANCELLED, EXPIRED)
multi_model_engine.E_kill_switch_drill: PASS - activation/deactivation works, UI reflects state

rules_transparency.G_rule_chips: PASS - 7-9 chips per model showing Edge min, Score min, Persist, Cooldown
rules_transparency.H_rules_drawer: PASS - human summary, JSON config, history with diffs, rollback endpoint
rules_transparency.I_trade_explainability: PASS - decision logs with reason, market_id, edge, signal_score

mocked_apis_list: KalshiAdapterSandbox - simulation mode for paper trading
MockKalshiAdapter - mock market prices based on ESPN probability

ui_verification.strategy_command_center: PASS - shows Model A/B/C with capital, PnL, metrics
ui_verification.rule_chips: PASS - Edge min, Score min, Persist, Cooldown visible per model
ui_verification.view_rules_drawer: PASS - shows Summary, JSON, History tabs with full config
ui_verification.kill_switch_button: PASS - prominently displayed in Control Panel
ui_verification.navigation_tabs: PASS - Overview, Comparison, By League, Positions all working
ui_verification.admin_controls: PASS - Reset Model A/B/C buttons, JSON/CSV export
